breaches.description: A large-scale data dump containing UPI IDs and linked phone numbers was posted on a dark web forum. Likely origin: compromised third-party merchant app.
UPI IDs harvested via a mass phishing campaign targeting e-commerce users. Data found circulating on Telegram hacker groups.
A merchant payment aggregator suffered a breach. UPI IDs of frequent customers were exposed alongside aggregated transaction metadata.
Credentials obtained via stuffing attacks on a fintech app. MPIN hashes and device IDs were exposed alongside UPI IDs.
UPI IDs scraped from publicly shared QR codes on social media and e-commerce platforms. Low severity — no financial data linked.
Part of a combo list sold on dark web marketplaces. Includes financial profile data suggesting insider access to a payment platform.
Telecom subscriber data leaked and cross-referenced with registered UPI IDs. Exposure limited to identity metadata.
UPI IDs collected through automated scraping of payment request links shared in public WhatsApp groups and forums.
A downstream vendor of a major payments processor was compromised. Highly sensitive PII including partial Aadhaar numbers were exposed.
A health-tech startup's payment module was breached. UPI IDs linked to insurance premium payments were exposed.
This is a test entry for demonstration purposes.
Demonstration entry — simulates a high-severity phishing breach.
